thread.title: Kirk Cameron Announces 2025 Strong Families, Strong Communities Tour
thread.title_full: Kirk Cameron Announces 2025 Strong Families, Strong Communities Tour

title: Kirk Cameron Announces 2025 Strong Families, Strong Communities Tour
text: Tour News Kirk Cameron Announces 2025 Strong Families, Strong Communities Tour GMA News Nov 22, 2024 1:13:13 PM Actor, filmmaker, and author Kirk Cameron announces his 2025 Strong Families, Strong Communities Tour beginning February 7, 2025. This tour will feature a night full of inspiration and hope with a reminder that God is always on your side. The night will also feature special worship from Matt Hammitt. Visit here for ticketing information. "This tour is a call to recapture the biblical vision of victory, reawaken our Christian birthright of courage, and remind one another that true revival comes when we reform ourselves, strengthen our families, and share Christ’s truth and love with our communities. I’m excited to bring this message across the nation on the Strong Families, Strong Communities Tour," shares Kirk Cameron. Join actor Kirk Cameron for an inspiring evening of worship and teaching as he unveils the transformative insights of his new book, "Born to Be Brave." In a time of exciting cultural transition, Cameron delivers a compelling message of hope and courage. Drawing on biblical insights and personal stories, Cameron will gather the family of faith to encourage us to live compassionately, act with unwavering confidence and courage, to not just “stand strong,” but win the hearts and minds of this generation for the glory of God. Cameron adds, "This cultural moment could be our divine opportunity for a powerful comeback. Instead of cowering and complaining, we can embrace the call to rebuild our homes, stand strong, and powerfully influence society through our faith and compassion." Special VIP tickets are available and include a 30-minute Q&A with Kirk Cameron, as well as an early entrance, and a coupon for the book Born To Be Brave. Pre-sale options begin today with tickets on sale to the public Friday, November 22, at 10 a.m. local time. Visit www.kirkcamerontour.com for ticket options.
